summary: Full backend + frontend testing of auth, POI upvoting/flagging, admin moderation, and leaderboard features. 18 backend tests: 16 passed, 2 test fixture errors (fixed by adding millisecond precision to usernames). All 18 tests passing after fix. All frontend flows verified via Playwright.

issues: 'Your Rank' card shows 'Login' text as placeholder value — could use a more informative prompt like 'Log in to see rank'

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 581 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold; consider splitting auth helpers and routes into separate modules
Admin seed (startup) only creates if not existing — if admin password changes in .env, existing hash is NOT updated. Consider upsert with password hash update.
JWT_SECRET defaults to 'dev-secret' — ensure production .env sets this explicitly
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' if env var missing — should enforce explicit origin in production
seed_data_creation: Test POIs and test users created via backend tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth, POI, admin, leaderboard APIs verified working. Frontend: auth modal (neon design), admin badge in navbar, leaderboard page, moderation gate for guests all confirmed working. Map shows 'Login to Pin' for guests. Test data prefixed TEST_ was created and left in DB.
